title: Restricting Column Edit Across Other Views
excerpt:

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am wondering if when you restrict column edit on a date or timeline field, does that restriction apply across other board views?

It is very easy to accidentally change dates on the gantt and timeline views, so in order to reduce the risk of that happening, I am hoping to use the restrict column edit on the main table and have those permissions apply across all views like Gantt and Timeline views where this is most likely to happen.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @kaylak !

Yes, if you do restrict editing rights on a main board column, such as the timeline column, then it is not possible for a user that does not have permission to make changes regarding that column in other views!

Hope this helps,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
